General.Name: China Outfitters Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Huicheng International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, markets, and sells apparels and accessories in Mainland China and Taiwan. It operates through Apparel Products and Accessories; and Property Development segments. The company offers men's casual wear, including smart casual wear, outdoor casual wear, leisure wear, and accessories under licensed and self-owned brands targeting consumers in the mid-to-high income bracket. It also provides womenswear and accessories; and manages and operates children's clothing brands, as well as provides technical services. In addition, the company develops, operates, and manages properties. It sells its products through self-operated retail points in department stores and shopping malls; and retail points operated by third-party retailers. Its licensed brands include Santa Barbara Polo & Racquet Club; and self-owned brands comprise London Fog, Zoo York, MCS, Henry Cotton's, and Marina Yachting. The company was formerly known as China Outfitters Holdings Limited and changed its name to Huicheng International Holdings Limited in June 2024. Huicheng International Holdings Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

4.Name: Mr. Yi  Lu
4.Title: VP, Chief Sales Officer, Chief Branding Officer & Regional Sales Controller
